MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Sojurn Properties is present. Represented by David Saenz.
Attorney David Brillant appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant William Oberhofer is present.
Attorney E. Cristin O'Keefe representing the defendant through limited scope.

Judge Quidachay, litigants and counsel confer privately chambers, for settlement discussions.

The case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of NOV-14-2011 is vacated.
